title: EvoOptiGraph: Weakness-Driven Coevolution via Graph-Based Structural Generation for Optimization Modeling
abstract: arXiv:2606.26578v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Automating optimization modeling from natural language with large language models (LLMs) faces two key challenges. First, training corpora lack structural diversity. Second, data generation pipelines remain static and decoupled from model learning. To address these challenges, we propose EvoOptiGraph, a novel framework where data and model co-evolve, driven by model weaknesses. EvoOptiGraph represents each mixed-integer linear program (MILP) as an attributed bipartite graph and applies validity-preserving evolutionary operators to generate structurally diverse instances. The evolved graphs are converted into solver code and natural language via deterministic compilation and verified back-translation. Training proceeds in two stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on an initial dataset, followed by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), where graph-derived weakness signals guide the generation of new instances targeting the

translated_title: EvoOptiGraph：基于图结构生成的弱点驱动协同进化优化建模方法
translated_abstract: 利用大语言模型从自然语言自动生成优化模型面临两个关键挑战。首先，训练语料库缺乏结构多样性。其次，数据生成流程保持静态，与模型学习相脱节。为解决这些挑战，我们提出了EvoOptiGraph，这是一种新颖的框架，其中数据和模型以模型弱点为驱动力协同进化。EvoOptiGraph将每个混合整数线性规划表示为属性二分图，并应用保持有效性的进化算子来生成结构多样的实例。通过确定性编译和验证性反向翻译，进化后的图被转换为求解器代码和自然语言。训练分为两个阶段：在初始数据集上进行监督微调，随后进行带可验证奖励的强化学习，其中基于图的弱点信号指导生成针对模型当前薄弱点的新实例。
tldr: 提出EvoOptiGraph框架，通过将优化模型表示为图结构并利用弱点驱动的协同进化，自动生成结构多样的训练数据，从而提升大语言模型在优化建模任务上的性能。
en_tdlr: EvoOptiGraph proposes a weakness-driven coevolution framework that represents optimization models as graph structures to automatically generate structurally diverse training data, improving LLM performance on optimization modeling tasks.
